hypothesis: Incorporating edge features that encode pairwise interaction strengths between gas species—computed from physics-based reaction-rate data—into the inductive GraphSAGE framework will maintain or improve etching-rate prediction accuracy when extending from two-gas Ar/O2 mixtures to three-gas Ar/O2/N2 mixtures on PMMA etching, compared to a baseline model that relies solely on node features without edge information.
